title: NYC Alt Cloud Meetup (Nov 2025)
description:
5:30pm: Gather, snacks, cocktails  
6:00pm: Meetup

....> [Shayne Stubbs](https://www.linkedin.com/in/shayne-stubbs/), Co-founder of Attimis  
….> [Jake Moshenko](https://www.linkedin.com/in/jake-moshenko/), CEO at [AuthZed](https://authzed.com)  
….> [Drew Raines](https://www.linkedin.com/in/andrewraines/), Head of Eng at Datum

  
7:00pm - Networking  
8:00pm - Wrap it up, team!  
  
_Brought to you by the team at_ _[Datum](https://www.datum.net/)_ _with partnership from_ _[Vine](https://vineventures.com/)__,_ _[Headline](https://www.headline.com)__,_ _[Amplify](https://www.amplifypartners.com/)__, and_ _[ex/ante](https://www.buildexante.com)__._  

**Vibe**  
40-50 founders/operators/leaders with content that focuses on tech but veers easily into business; a good dose of networking time; craft cocktails; small bites; and low to zero bullshit. 

**Presenters**  
For this meetup we're focusing on security, hitting both auth and compliance. We'll focus on those two topics, but sneak in a demo from Datum's head of engineering (Drew Raines) as well.

*   **Shayne Stubbs** will be presenting Attimis OneBucket - Local Access to Data Anywhere
*   Everyone is working from an incomplete model when it comes to agent authorization. Deadly trifecta? Incomplete and overrated. Just an extension of the user? Almost never. **Jake Moshenko** will discuss some of the ways that agents behave like people and some of the ways they don't, and why none of us are fully prepared for the ways they will stress test our products and organizations.
*   **Drew Raines** will be previewing some cool demos!
    *     
        **Location**  
        We hide out at the 10th floor "speakeasy" lounge in the Equitable Building at 120 Broadway (right across from Trinity Church in New York's Financial District). We think you'll like the nooks and crannies.

![](https://images.lumacdn.com/cdn-cgi/image/format=auto,dpr=2,anim=false,background=white,quality=75,width=800/editor-images/o2/9523318c-d427-4729-bd5d-fd8655a17358.jpg)

**Mutual Aid**  
In the spirit of cooperation, we invite attendees to fill out a “[mutual aid](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mutual_aid#:~:text=History,-A%20mutual%2Daid&text=The%20term%20%22mutual%20aid%22%20was,behind%20evolution%2C%20through%20biological%20mutualism.)” request. When you arrive, grab a notecard and share something that you need help with - as a group we’ll try to help.  

![](https://images.lumacdn.com/cdn-cgi/image/format=auto,dpr=2,anim=false,background=white,quality=75,width=800/editor-images/md/e1aff2af-63a2-4e9d-abd8-235d49d866d0.jpg)
